name: Apple Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare, core and slice the apples.
2. Quarter and slice the oranges.
3. In a heavy kettle, heat water and sugar until the sugar dissolves.
4. Add the fruit and lemon juice to the mixture.
5. Bring the mixture to a full boil and boil rapidly, stirring constantly, until it reaches 8 to 10 degrees above the boiling point of water.
6. Remove from heat immediately and skim off any foam.
7. Pour into hot sterile jars and process for 10 minutes in boiling water bath.
8. Makes 6 (1/2 pint) jars.
